title: begonia rambutan
intro: Begonia rambutan is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae, also known as the "Dragon's Blood Begonia" due to its red sap. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Begonia rambutan include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as wounds, burns, and eczema. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
